Video.summary: Gina separated from her husband Nate because she could never get along with his family. But Nate says that he's always had suspicions that their child wasn't really his. Then, Damond says that he doubts that he's the real father of Kendahl's child.
Video.title: DNA: It's Your Baby

Video.summary: Latoya is worried that her sister Tenielle’s boyfriend Ashley is molesting Tenielle’s 4 year old daughter! Latoya and the child’s father Antonio are here because they demand Ashley prove his innocence with a lie detector test!
Video.title: Explosive Lie Detector Results

Video.summary: Katrina says she was molested by her step-father as a child. Katrina says that when she told her mother Phyllis, she not only forgave him, but stayed with himI And there's more... Katrina says after telling Phyllis, he continued to molest her!
Video.title: A Family Ripped Apart

Video.summary: Jasmine’s 11 year old sister Lauren has had multiple sexual partners, stays out of the house for days on end and is headed on a downward spiral! Watch as Steve tries to help this troubled child and set her mother straight!
Video.title: Tragic Tale of Two Sisters

Video.summary: A couple's children are taken away after the six-month-old nearly dies from having a baby wipe lodged in her windpipe; Shawn says his daughter came home with severe bruising on her body after staying with her mother and told him her mother beat her.
Video.title: Your Kids Need Their Mom, But You Chose Him

Image.alt: Your Kids Need Their Mom, But You Chose Him
Your Kids Need Their Mom, But You Chose Him
Your Kids Need Their Mom, But You Chose Him

Video.summary: Jeremy hasn't seen his child in four years, but after coming clean, he wants to right the wrongs that he's done. Julie, his ex and mother of their child, doesn't buy it, claiming that he spends more time with his new girlfriends child than his own.
Video.title: Why Aren't You A Father

Video.summary: Elaina and her husband Lennard claim their daughter was raped by her brother-in-law Lenel. Lenel’s fiancée and Elaina’s sister, Elissa, believes they’re making up this entire story. Don’t miss the shocking results today!
Video.title: Justice Will Be Served Today

Video.summary: Thomas and Sharette accuse each other of cheating; Heather thinks questionable marks on her boyfriend's body came from another woman.
Video.title: Steve, Speak for Me ... Please

Video.summary: Ashley and DeNorris accuse each other of cheating; Jim denies having sex with his fiancee's sister and underage girls.
Video.title: I Got a Bad Feeling About This

Image.alt: I Got a Bad Feeling About This
I Got a Bad Feeling About This
I Got a Bad Feeling About This

Video.summary: When this young man says that he'd kill his own mother if the gang asked him to, Steve decides to hold an intervention. With the help of an ex-gang member, they try to speak some truth into this gangster from suburbia.
Video.title: Steve's Gang Intervention

Video.summary: Thomazina’s boyfriend died a year ago and she thinks her daughter, Destiney slept with him! She also suspects Destiney tried to poison her with bleach! In December, Chris and Jesse’s baby died and they blame Jesse’s mother!
Video.title: My Daughter Tried to Poison Me

Image.alt: My Daughter Tried to Poison Me
My Daughter Tried to Poison Me
My Daughter Tried to Poison Me

Video.summary: Jennifer fears that her husband Tim is addicted to teenage porn and has heard rumors of him sneaking underage girls into their house. Is Amanda’s man a child molester and peeping Tom? How will these wives react to the lie detector test results?
Video.title: Does My Husband Have a Creepy Addiction?

Image.alt: Does My Husband Have a Creepy Addiction?
Does My Husband Have a Creepy Addiction?
Does My Husband Have a Creepy Addiction?

Video.summary: According to Drew, the baby was bottle-fed gin and died. Shawn, the grieving mother, claims she had no prior knowledge of the bottle containing gin and believes it was tampered with, possibly by her own sister and friend. Who’s responsible?
Video.title: A Fatal Mistake

Video.summary: Alvin began to get very distant from his family, so Andrea began a relationship with Chris, a man she met on a chat line. Then, Brittany and Tony have an infant daughter together, but since getting Brittany pregnant he has abandoned his family.
Video.title: You Said I Wasn't The Father

Image.alt: You Said I Wasn't The Father
You Said I Wasn't The Father
You Said I Wasn't The Father

Video.summary: Quentien fears that his girlfriend is cheating and his sister is covering up for her; Tabitha's boyfriend admitted to hooking up with a young woman, then took it back.
Video.title: Is Everyone Hiding A Secret?

Video.summary: Very intimate photos of newlywed Chami with another man surface on a porn website; Keandra's boyfriend has accused her of cheating with co-workers, strangers and an elderly neighbor.
Video.title: I Saw My Wife on a Porn Site

Image.alt: I Saw My Wife on a Porn Site
I Saw My Wife on a Porn Site
I Saw My Wife on a Porn Site

Video.summary: Valarie is here to get custody of her children because she says their father Roy has been abusing them. Roy says that it's her boyfriend who is the abuser. Then, Jennifer is here to because she want's her sister Amber to leave her boyfriend Ceasarae.
Video.title: I've Seen Him Hit Her

Video.summary: Shamika says she had not spoken to her 8-year-old daughter in 18 days and had no idea the child was missing until she and her ex-boyfriend were questioned by the FBI.
Video.title: The Disappearance of Relisha Rudd

Video.summary: A look at guests who are subjected to emotional abuse that chips away at their self-worth and independence.
Video.title: Relationships Exposed

Video.summary: David believes his wife Shamonda is cheating on him and that she might be having sex for money! Plus, Matt believes that his girlfriend is a prostitute. She admits she has accepted money and gifts from men, but swears she gave nothing in return.
Video.title: I Think My Wife Is A Prostitute

Image.alt: I Think My Wife Is A Prostitute
I Think My Wife Is A Prostitute
I Think My Wife Is A Prostitute

Video.summary: Released from jail, Chris doubts he is his girlfriend's baby's father; before marrying Tamaiya, Marquice wants to be sure her children are biologically his.
Video.title: I Was In Jail, Am I The Father?

Image.alt: I Was In Jail, Am I The Father?
I Was In Jail, Am I The Father?
I Was In Jail, Am I The Father?

Video.summary: Jenny’s a 20-year-old illiterate prostitute who’s 9 months pregnant and refuses to stop working. Her mom, a former prostitute and drug addict, needs Steve’s help. Then, Rick asks Steve to convince his daughter Jennifer to stop using!
Video.title: Steve Saves a Pregnant Prostitute / A Father’s Nightmare

Image.alt: Steve Saves a Pregnant Prostitute / A Father’s Nightmare
Steve Saves a Pregnant Prostitute / A Father’s Nightmare
Steve Saves a Pregnant Prostitute / A Father’s Nightmare

Video.summary: Taking a stand! After years of abuse and living in fear, Kristen finally thought she found the strength to leave her abusive relationship with Terrell behind. He openly admits to abusing Kristen and taking his rage out on her, but thinks he can change for the better. Changing a bad habit is never easy, but Steve may be the last hope this family has.
Video.title: You Won't Beat Me Again

Video.summary: Nesi thinks Omar is cheating on her with another man from text messages on his phone. Plus, Karissa’s life fell apart after she and her husband moved in with Josh! A few weeks later, their baby mysteriously died. What will the lie detectors say?
Video.title: Does My Boyfriend Have a Gay Secret?

Image.alt: Does My Boyfriend Have a Gay Secret?
Does My Boyfriend Have a Gay Secret?
Does My Boyfriend Have a Gay Secret?

Video.summary: First, Daniel has almost a dozen children with ten different women. While he admits to being their father, he refuses to care and provide for most of them. Then, Tadrianna strips and has sex for money and her mother, Kim, can't convince her to stop.
Video.title: I Have 11 Kids with 10 Women

Video.summary: A sisters nightmare ... 11-year-old Ana is terrified of older brother Ray who's regularly beat her since she was just five years old. Ana's fears have grown so much, she fears for her life every night when she goes to bed. While Ray is only 13, his on-stage behavior reveals his true colors, and shocks even Steve. With Ana's mother out of solutions, it's up to Steve and past guest Gary, to show Ray a better path in life and help Ana.
Video.title: My Big Brother Beats Me

Video.summary: Jeremy and Amber assault each other daily, and he questions whether he is the father of her baby girl; upon learning that his ex has a baby who might be his, Jeff convinced her to move across the country to be with him, then kicked them out.
Video.title: DNA: Emotions Out of Control

Video.summary: Taylor and Joseph admit to getting into violent arguments where he slapped, choked, scratched and even threw objects at her, but agree that if they can prove neither cheated, then their violent streak will end. But will it end?
Video.title: I'm Not Sorry I Beat Her

Image.alt: I'm Not Sorry I Beat Her
I'm Not Sorry I Beat Her
I'm Not Sorry I Beat Her

Video.summary: George thinks his girlfriend is sleeping with her daughter's boyfriend; Adam says Tiffany has been trying for six years to trick him into confessing that he has been cheating on her.
Video.title: I Know She's Cheating With Her Daughter's Boyfriend

Image.alt: I Know She's Cheating With Her Daughter's Boyfriend
I Know She's Cheating With Her Daughter's Boyfriend
I Know She's Cheating With Her Daughter's Boyfriend

Video.summary: Jackie and her children live with a registered sex offender; accused of touching his own son, Ronnie takes a lie-detector test and demands a DNA test too.
Video.title: You Chose the Abuser over Your Kids

Image.alt: You Chose the Abuser over Your Kids
You Chose the Abuser over Your Kids
You Chose the Abuser over Your Kids

Video.summary: Heather received a message from Alisha saying that she was pregnant with Remondo's baby but Remondo is Heathers boyfriend! Plus, Silvina and Clee'chaun have been in a relationship for almost 10 years and they've never met in person!
Video.title: She's Not Pregnant, We Never Had Sex

Image.alt: She's Not Pregnant, We Never Had Sex
She's Not Pregnant, We Never Had Sex
She's Not Pregnant, We Never Had Sex

Video.summary: Trina's fiance says he heard a voicemail that sounded like her having sex with another man; Amy has put up with her boyfriend's constant accusations of cheating for four years.
Video.title: Steve's Cheat Detector Kit?

Video.summary: Davonna believes that her husband Michael never abused her son. Her son told his dad Brandon that Michael punched him in the nose and back. Then, Evie wants to prove that she never abused her son and deserves custody of him from her mother!
Video.title: My Son Said You Beat Him

Image.alt: My Son Said You Beat Him
My Son Said You Beat Him
My Son Said You Beat Him
